Thanks for the contribution. Please run through the checklist below
before requesting review.
-->

## Summary

<!-- One or two sentences on what changes and why. -->

## Related issues

<!-- Closes #N, refs #M, etc. Leave blank if none. -->

## Checklist

- [ ] Tests added or updated under `tests/Unit` or `tests/Feature`
- [ ] `make test` passes locally
- [ ] `make stan` passes locally (PHPStan level 6, no new ignores)
- [ ] `make pint` was run (formatting matches)
- [ ] `CHANGELOG.md` `[Unreleased]` section updated for user-visible changes
- [ ] Documentation (`README.md` or inline) updated where applicable
- [ ] No new dependencies added without justification

## Notes for the reviewer

<!-- Anything that needs context: trade-offs, alternatives considered,
follow-ups deferred to another PR, etc. -->
